channel.title: Notice board | Unimi
channel.description: General notice board of the University of Milan "La Statale"

item.title: Maker Faire Rome: applications open until 15 June 2026
item.description: Applications are now open for Maker Faire Rome, the exhibition that celebrates the most innovative projects from public universities and research institutes.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: Upcoming strike
item.description: On Monday, 18 May there may be service disruptions due to a general strike. However, this will not affect the following services: final exams for Bachelor’s and Master’s degrees, postgraduate schools and PhD programmes, issuing of urgent certificates.%0A

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the B1 Preliminary (PET) exam
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge B1 Preliminary (PET) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in June-July at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the C1 Advanced (CAE) exam - SOLD OUT
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge C1 Advanced (CAE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in June-July at the SLAM Centre according to the calendar reported in the call.%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for the English language development course in view of the B2 First (FCE) exam- SOLD OUT
item.description: Registration is open for the English language development course with a view to sitting the Cambridge B2 First (FCE) exam. Classes, for the whole duration of 20 hours, are taking place in person in June-July at the University venue in Piazza S. Alessandro 1 according to the calendar reported in the call%0A%0A📄 Read the call for further details

item.title: Call for admissions to Collegio di Milano - a. y. 2026-2027
Extended weekend opening hours at the BICF Library
item.description: From Saturday, 7 February 2026, the Biology, Chemistry, Physics, and Computer Sciences Library (BICF) will extend its weekend opening hours: Saturday and Sunday, 9-20.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it

item.title: University Library Service – spring course calendar 2026
item.description: The list of courses offered by the University Library Service in spring 2026 is now online. These courses focus on the use of databases, and are open to the entire University community.%0A%0A▶️ Learn more on Unimi.it
